page_metadata.biotools__summary: VarSum is an API that returns summary statistics on user-defined populations and their variants, using the genomic data repository maintained by the genomic computing group (GeCo) at Politecnico di Milano.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: VarSum is an API that returns summary statistics on user-defined populations and their variants, using the genomic data repository maintained by the genomic computing group (GeCo) at Politecnico di Milano.
